name: Ergo-Wireless Mouse
description: A modern, wireless ergonomic mouse designed for comfort and precision. Features a rechargeable battery and customizable buttons.

name: Mechanical Keyboard Pro
description: A mechanical keyboard with customizable RGB backlighting, tactile switches, and a durable aluminum frame for the ultimate typing experience.

name: 4K UHD Monitor
description: A 27-inch 4K UHD monitor with vibrant colors, wide viewing angles, and a slim bezel design. Perfect for creative professionals.

name: Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Over-ear noise-cancelling headphones with high-fidelity audio, 30-hour battery life, and a comfortable design for long listening sessions.

name: Ultralight Pro Laptop
description: A lightweight and powerful 14-inch laptop for professionals on the go. Features a high-resolution display and all-day battery life.
